info.title: HIV.D HIV-TB API
info.description: This tab describes the data that may be collected during care and treatment clinical visit for HIV/TB care (HIV.D)

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVDHIVTB
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVDHIVTB.

StructureDefinition-HIVDHIVTB.title: HIV.D HIV-TB
StructureDefinition-HIVDHIVTB.description: This tab describes the data that may be collected during care and treatment clinical visit for HIV/TB care (HIV.D)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVDHIVTB logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVDHIVTB logical model

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE934

whoHivClinicalStageConditionOrSymptom.description: New or recurrent clinical events used to categorize HIV disease severity based at baseline and follow up

tbDisease.description: Whether the client has tuberculosis (TB) disease. Sometimes known as active TB

tbDiagnosisResult.description: Final result of the TB investigation (bacteriological and/or clinical)

methodOfTbDiagnosis.description: Method used to set the TB diagnosis

presumptiveTb.description: Client has signs or symptoms of tuberculosis (TB) without laboratory confirmation

presumptiveTbRegistrationDate.description: Date client is registered as having signs or symptoms of tuberculosis (TB) without laboratory confirmation

dateOfTbDiagnosis.description: The date when the diagnosis was established

tbPreventiveTreatmentTptStartDate.description: The date on which the client began taking TPT

tbPreventiveTreatmentTptCompletionDate.description: The date on which the client completed TPT

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE956

tbScreeningAlgorithm.description: Screening algorithm selected for screening activities

otherTbScreeningAlgorithmSpecify.description: Client screened for tuberculosis (TB) with a different screening method not listed (specify)

tbScreeningConducted.description: A screening for tuberculosis (TB) was performed

symptomsOfTb.description: Symptoms that may indicate TB disease in clients living with HIV, based on a clinical algorithm

historyOfContactWithAPersonWithTb.description: Client had a history of a contact with a person with TB

tbScreeningResult.description: Record the result of the tuberculosis (TB) screening

tbScreeningDate.description: Date the TB screening was conducted

tbScreeningResultDate.description: The date when the result of TB screening is available

tbDiagnosticTestCategory.description: The type of diagnostic test performed to detect tuberculosis (TB) disease

tbDiagnosticTestDate.description: The date when TB diagnostic test was performed

testSampleCollectionDate.description: The date when the test sample was collected from the client

tbDiagnosticTestResultDate.description: The date when the result of the TB diagnostic test is available

tbTreatmentStarted.description: Indicates if TB treatment was started

tbTreatmentStartDate.description: The date on which the client start or restarted tuberculosis (TB) treatment

items.description: Coding-shaped {system, code} object from ValueSet HIV.D.DE1010

tbTreatmentRegimenComposition.description: TB drugs currently being taken by the client

eligibleForTbPreventiveTreatment.description: Client is eligible for tuberculosis preventive treatment (TPT)

dateWhenEligibilityForTbPreventiveTreatm.description: Date when a determination of the client's eligibility for TPT was made

tbStatusAtArtStart.description: Client's tuberculosis (TB) status when antiretroviral therapy (ART) is started

tbPreventionServicesAccepted.description: Indicates if the client accepts to be evaluated for TB infection and to take the treatment in case he/she is eligible

tbMeningitis.description: Type of extrapulmonary TB identified for the client is TB meningitis

cReactiveProteinTestDate.description: The date on which the client has a test for C reactive protein

cReactiveProteinTestResult.description: Test result of the client's C reactive protein test result in mg/L

cReactiveProteinTestResultDate.description: The date when the client's test result for C reactive protein is available

tptRegimenType.description: Type of TPT regimen the client is currently on

tbPreventiveTreatmentTptStatus.description: Indicates the current status of TB preventive treatment (TPT)
